CustomField.description: The amount that the Lessor should cover with their own insurance if the Stipulated Insurance Req is lower than Min Insurance Req(real value of the Asset). Calculated as the difference between Min Ins Req and Stipulated Ins Req for this period
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The amount that the Lessor should cover with their own insurance if the Stipulated Insurance Req is lower than Min Insurance Req(real value of the Asset). Calculated as the difference between Min Ins Req and Stipulated Ins Req for this period
CustomField.label: Insurance Top Up
